tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All results are within or close to normal ranges. Mildly low fasting glucose may reflect recent dietary intake or mild hypoglycemia; monitor if symptomatic. Slightly elevated chloride is likely not clinically significant in isolation. Renal function, electrolytes, and HbA1c are normal. No acute laboratory concerns at this time.

text.div: Provider Organization: Punkt Lekarski w Cieksynie
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
